title: Ubeac - IoT Platform for Smart Buildings
description: IoT platform for unified building automation and control systems. Discover how we developed a scalable IoT solution connecting thousands of smart building devices.

content.overview: Ubeac provides enterprise IoT solutions for smart building management and automation. Their platform enables building owners and managers to connect, monitor, and control various IoT devices across multiple properties from a single interface.
content.challenge: Ubeac needed a scalable cloud platform to connect and manage diverse IoT devices across multiple buildings. The system had to handle real-time data streams, support complex automation rules, and provide actionable analytics while maintaining sub-second response times.
content.solution: We developed a cloud-based IoT platform leveraging Azure IoT Hub for device connectivity and CosmosDB for scalable data storage. The platform includes real-time device monitoring, customizable automation rules, and comprehensive analytics dashboards.
content.results: The platform successfully connects over 50,000 IoT devices and has helped clients achieve 30% energy savings. The real-time monitoring and automated alerts have significantly improved operational efficiency and reduced downtime.

seo_title: Ubeac Case Study | Momentaj - IoT Smart Building Platform Development
seo_description: Discover how Momentaj built Ubeac's IoT platform for smart building automation. Learn about the scalable architecture connecting 50,000+ devices.
seo_keywords: IoT platform, smart building, building automation, IoT solution, Azure IoT, Ubeac, device management
